summary: P1 feature testing complete. All 7 backend tests pass. Frontend crew dashboard, JobsItinerary, and SubscriptionBanners all render correctly.

issues: Pre-existing: <span> cannot be child of <option> hydration warning in JobFiltersRow.jsx line 27 (same pattern as previous iteration in ContractorDashboard). Not a blocker.

action_items: LOW: Fix <span> inside <option> in JobFiltersRow.jsx (line 27) — hydration warning, same pattern as ContractorDashboard
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/jobs/{id}/assignments: works correctly — returns 200 for admin, 403 for crew non-owner, 404 for missing job
POST /api/auth/register: returns 201 (not 200) — minor inconsistency with other endpoints that return 200, but functional
CrewDashboard sub-components (CrewDashboardHeader, SubscriptionBanners, JobFiltersRow) all render without errors
JobsItinerary loads without JS errors (Loader2 fix from iteration_1 still in place)
seed_data_creation: 1 TEST_ crew user created by register test (auto-cleanup not implemented)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified: assignments endpoint works for admin/403 for crew. Register returns 201 with access_token after auth_helpers refactor. CrewDashboardHeader shows Online/Offline toggle, Map/List switcher, Smart Match — all visible. SubscriptionBanners renders (no banner shown for active subscription users). JobsItinerary loads without JS errors and shows upcoming jobs. WebSocket job_completed_final listener is wired in code but cannot be E2E tested easily.
